# GB Network Parameters (CSV Export)

Network parameters exported from the pandapower GB network for all voltage levels.

**Source:** `pandapower.networks.GBnetwork()` — Great Britain transmission network (Bukhsh & McKinnon, 2013).

**Generated by:** `case_study/export_network_params.py`

## Files

| File | Description | Rows |
|------|-------------|------|
| `bus.csv` | Buses with `vn_kv`, `zone`, `type`, `in_service`, `geo` | 2224 |
| `line.csv` | Overhead/cable lines with `from_bus`, `to_bus`, `r_ohm_per_km`, `x_ohm_per_km`, `c_nf_per_km`, `length_km`, etc. | 1557 |
| `trafo.csv` | Two-winding transformers with `hv_bus`, `lv_bus`, `sn_mva`, `vn_hv_kv`, `vn_lv_kv`, `vk_percent`, tap, etc. | 1650 |
| `gen.csv` | Generators with `bus`, `p_mw`, `vm_pu`, etc. | 393 |
| `load.csv` | Loads with `bus`, `p_mw`, `q_mvar` | 446 |
| `shunt.csv` | Shunt admittances | 253 |
| `ext_grid.csv` | External grid (slack bus) | 1 |
| `voltage_levels.csv` | Summary: element counts per voltage level | 8 levels |

## Voltage Levels

The GB network has 8 voltage levels (kV): **6.6**, **11**, **22**, **33**, **66**, **132**, **275**, **400**.

- `bus.csv`: `vn_kv` / `voltage_level_kv` = nominal voltage
- `line.csv`: `vn_from_kv`, `vn_to_kv`, `voltage_level_kv` (from-bus voltage)
- `trafo.csv`: `voltage_level_hv_kv`, `voltage_level_lv_kv`
- `gen.csv`, `load.csv`, `shunt.csv`: `vn_kv` from connected bus

## Regenerating

From the project root:

```bash
python case_study/export_network_params.py
```
